cards.name: Sharkey
cards.quote: I have gone from tower to tower, and in each I was Master. So I shall be here, and you will all be the worse for it.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 20 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: The Lockholes
cards.quote: The Lockholes keep what the Chief does not wish spoken of â€” and those who spoke too freely.

cards.name: Scouring of the Shire
cards.quote: There is no corner of this land they will not reach, no garden they will not uproot, no window they will not darken.
cards.actionEffect: Destroy the fortifications of an enemy PC in radius 3 and reduce its loyalty by 20.

cards.name: Under the White Hand
cards.quote: A shadow looms, and the banners of Saruman stir with dark promise.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units in radius 2 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Pipe-weed Monopoly
cards.quote: All the pipe-weed of the Shire flows through Lotho's hand, and Lotho's hand belongs to the Chief.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 5 gold <sprite name="gold">. Draw Lured by Halflings' Leaf and The Lure of the Senses if hand size allows.

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.quote: In rough hides, much that is dear may be concealed.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in your hex are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn); caster gains Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Last Act of Malice
cards.quote: You have broken my staff, diminished me. So I lay this upon your little land: long shall it take to heal.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Cursed <sprite name="cursed"> (3 turns) to all enemy characters in radius 5 and reduce loyalty by 15 in radius 4.

cards.name: Lotho's Purse
cards.quote: Lotho bought what he could not make and made what he could not buy, and in the end owned neither.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 15 gold <sprite name="gold">. Leather and timber stores go to 0.

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.quote: A border well watched is a border half held.
cards.actionEffect: Eyes on the borders, always. Reveal the surrounding area, detect nearby enemies, and Halt an enemy army commander in your hex.

cards.name: Grima's Knife
cards.quote: The worm turned at last â€” not from strength, but from despair, and what it did could not be undone.
cards.actionEffect: Roll the dice: <25 caster is assassinated, 25-50 caster is wounded, 50-75 target is wounded, >75 target is killed.

cards.name: Stock
cards.quote: Stock keeps watch upon the Buckland road, where a lamp in the window still means comfort against the dark.

cards.name: Crickhollow
cards.quote: Crickhollow lies quiet under hedge and hill, a hidden door for those who must travel unseen.

cards.name: The Sack of Bag End
cards.quote: When the halls stood empty, hungry hands came softly in the dusk.
cards.actionEffect: Steal one transferable artifact from a random enemy character in your hex, if any are present.

cards.name: Bree
cards.quote: Bree keeps faith with the road, though the years grow wary.

cards.name: Shirriffs and Bounders
cards.quote: A quiet watch keeps the lanes from forgetting themselves.
cards.actionEffect: All hexes of the Shire are seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: Michel Delving
cards.quote: Michel Delving stands small to the eye, yet stout in the keeping of the Shire.

cards.name: TheShire
cards.quote: The Shire endures by patience and many watchful hands.

cards.name: Buckland
cards.quote: At Buckland the evening stillness is kept like a lamp in the window.

cards.name: Sarn Ford
cards.quote: At Sarn Ford the river keeps the western gate.

cards.name: Hobbiton
cards.quote: The green of Hobbiton seems soft, yet it has a watchful heart.

cards.name: Hobbit Archers
cards.quote: From the green hedges, a small bow may yet speak boldly.

cards.name: Hobbit Slingers
cards.quote: The road will remember the sting of stones.

cards.name: Fatty Bolger
cards.quote: The quiet gate is often the first to know of danger.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Paladin
cards.quote: Paladin holds fast where lesser hearts would fail.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: HarryGoatleaf
cards.quote: I’ll make sure the path is clear for the brave!
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the random enemy settlement for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Arthedain
cards.quote: Arthedain remembers its kings in the wind.

cards.name: Old Forest
cards.quote: The Old Forest is older than the road, and not all old things are kindly.

cards.name: Chopping the Trees
cards.quote: The axe bites deep; the forest's heart quakes at the sound.
cards.actionEffect: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

cards.name: False Parley
cards.quote: Words can be as sharp as swords; choose them wisely.
cards.actionEffect: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 <sprite name="hc"> and +1 <sprite name="lc">.

cards.name: Lured by Halflings' Leaf
cards.quote: The sweet scent of the Shire can ensnare even the mightiest of foes.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy Maia in radius 2: Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn) and Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (2 turns).

cards.name: NewOrder
cards.quote: A fresh dawn breaks, heralding the reforge of our ambitions.
cards.actionEffect: Remove all your Gold. Add +5 Timber, +5 Iron, +5 Steel. Gain +2 Fortification at your capital.

cards.name: TheLureOfTheSenses
cards.quote: In the haze of battle, the senses deceive, and danger lurks unseen.
cards.actionEffect: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.

cards.name: WildFire
cards.quote: The forest weeps as flames dance, a terrible beauty unleashed.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Burning <sprite name="burning"> (1 turn) to all enemy units on forest tiles within radius 2.

cards.name: Wormtongue's Whisper
cards.quote: In the ears of kings, whispers weave deceit like silken threads.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units in radius 2 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Bill Ferny
cards.quote: In shadows he lingers, a merchant of malice and deceit.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the random enemy settlement for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Southrons
cards.quote: With fierce hearts, they tread the sands, claiming the day as their own.

cards.name: Wolves
cards.quote: The howl of the pack heralds the hunt's beginning.

cards.name: Uncautious Supper
cards.quote: A flame unwatched at meal may summon the long eye of night.
cards.actionEffect: At supper or rest, Hobbits in radius 2 lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and take 15 damage.

cards.name: A Mithril coat
cards.quote: Mithril's light outlasts the pride of kings.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (3 turns).

cards.name: Caravans
cards.quote: Caravans know the price of every road.
cards.actionEffect: Sell up to 3 available resources and gain 25% extra <sprite name="gold"> versus normal sale value.

cards.name: Voice of Authority
cards.quote: A word spoken with rightful power bends the will without breaking it.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied population center: gain +15 loyalty and +1 <sprite name="gold">.

cards.name: Half Orcs
cards.quote: Born of shadow, they revel in chaos and bloodshed.

cards.name: Mounted Half-Orcs
cards.quote: With the speed of a wild storm, they charge into battle.

cards.name: Torch Bearers
cards.quote: Flickering flames lead the way through the encroaching darkness.

cards.name: Hounds
cards.quote: With a howl that chills the heart, they hunt in packs, relentless and fierce.

cards.name: Mangonels
cards.quote: With a great roar, we unleash fate upon our foes.

cards.name: Lobelia Sackville-Baggins
cards.quote: You'll get no satisfaction from me — not if you drag me out of my own hole with your ruffian hands!
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Will Whitfoot
cards.quote: They locked the Mayor away, but they could not lock away what the office stood for.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 20 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: BagginsDontLeaveHere
cards.quote: A small foot may slip where a dark thought would stumble.
cards.actionEffect: Hobbits within a personal radius of 2-4 hexes gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> for 1 turn and lose Fear <sprite name="fear">.

cards.name: Bree Rumours
cards.quote: Five blind places are named by whisper, and the map remembers them.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal 5 random unrevealed hexes as unseen.

cards.name: LanternsAtBreeGate
cards.quote: Lantern-light leaves little room for shadow.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal all hexes in radius 3 as seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: MathomHouse
cards.quote: What was put by in peace may yet be found useful in need.
cards.actionEffect: From the old mathoms, you gain 1<sprite name="iron"> 1<sprite name="steel"> 1<sprite name="mithril">.

cards.name: Muddy Lane
cards.quote: Even the mud may exact its due, till the purse and store are both made lighter.
cards.actionEffect: Mired roads slow all movement. The strongest enemy commander on the board loses resources to stuck caravans.

cards.name: The Ford
cards.quote: A ford may be a road to one and a snare to another.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 2 that stand beside water are Halted <sprite name="halted"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: The Greenway
cards.quote: Along the old road, quick feet and faithful hearts may yet outpace the shadow.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Hobbit, Dunedain, and Dwarf units in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> for 2 turns.

cards.name: The Prancing Pony
cards.quote: A welcoming inn can gather the far-wandered home.
cards.actionEffect: Move up to 2 Hobbit, Dunedain, or Dwarf allies from adjacent hexes into your hex, and heal them 10.

cards.name: Old Ruins of Arthedain
cards.quote: Broken kings still leave a brightness in the stones.
cards.actionEffect: Arthedain, Cardolan, and Rhudaur each reveal 2 hexes as seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: Riddle
cards.quote: A true word may yet turn the sword-arm aside, and set the boldest heart to doubt.
cards.actionEffect: Choose one character. Their refusal of duels ends, and you will win any duel forced on you this turn.

cards.name: Lotho Sackville-Baggins
cards.quote: I am Chief now. The Chief. And if I say that you sell it, you sell it.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 4 gold <sprite name="gold"> from Shire taxation.

cards.name: Mat Heathertoes
cards.quote: There's always work for men who ask the right questions and forget to hear the answers.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn) to all enemy characters in the caster's hex.

cards.name: Destroy the Mill
cards.quote: Where once flour was ground for honest bread, now smoke billows at all hours and the river runs grey.
cards.actionEffect: Reduce loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 10. Enemy PC owner loses up to 3 of each resource.

cards.name: The Battle of Bywater
cards.quote: At the Battle of Bywater they fell upon the ruffians from hedge and ditch — and the Shire was its own again.
cards.actionEffect: Destroy all enemy light infantry <sprite name="li"> forces in radius 3.

cards.name: Imprisonment
cards.quote: The Lockholes do not kill — they merely forget. You are there until the Chief decides otherwise.
cards.actionEffect: Kidnap a target enemy character in the caster's hex.

cards.name: Industrialization
cards.quote: Trees fell, water ran foul, and smoke lay low over the hills. The Shire was being improved, they said.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 5 iron <sprite name="iron"> and 5 steel <sprite name="steel">. All PCs in radius 5 lose 15 loyalty <sprite name="loyalty">.

cards.name: Ruffians
cards.quote: Rough men, unasked-for, with clubs and cudgels, who take what they want and call it order.

cards.name: Bywater
cards.quote: Bywater sits at the crossing of roads and the meeting of waters, and does not forget either.

cards.name: Ring of Orthanc
cards.quote: The ring upon the White Hand weighs heavier than iron, and those who see it know the tower's will.
cards.actionEffect: The stone sings to those of Saruman’s order. Allied characters here heal 15 (25 on Orthanc); allied army commanders gain 1 Heavy Infantry <sprite name="hi"> (2 on Orthanc).

cards.name: Bounders
cards.quote: A quiet watch is the first wall of the Shire.

cards.name: Corruption
cards.quote: The spirit falters where the shadow touches.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="poisoned">Poison an enemy character (turns scale with Mage).
